channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Canada’s first World Cup ends with Spain’s victory over Argentina
item.description: FIFA’s largest-ever World Cup concluded on Sunday with Spain defeating Argentina 1-0 in a final held in East Rutherford, New Jersey. The tournament, featuring 48 teams, marked Canada’s first hosting o...

item.title: Political Rivalry Intensifies as PML-N and PPP Vie for Control in AJK Elections
item.description: The Azad Jammu and Kashmir (AJK) elections are witnessing a fierce political battle between the Pakistan Muslim League-Nawaz (PML-N) and the Pakistan People's Party (PPP), with both parties' top leade...

item.title: ABC compliance bot and antisemitism at royal commission
item.description: The article discusses concerns surrounding the Australian Broadcasting Corporation's (ABC) compliance processes and their handling of antisemitism allegations within the context of the Royal Commissio...

item.title: Floods and Landslides Disrupt Kashmir, Impacting River Flows
item.description: The article details severe flooding and landslides in Indian-administered Kashmir, causing significant casualties and infrastructure damage. Heavy rains triggered flash floods and landslides, burying ...

item.title: Jurgen Klopp Confirms Germany Coaching Role in Next Few Days
item.description: Former Liverpool manager Jurgen Klopp has confirmed he will take charge of Germany's national team in the next few days, according to a report by Naija News. The 59-year-old, currently Red Bull's Spor...

item.title: ABS-CBN's Word of the Day: Trionda - July 20, 2026
item.description: The article announces the 'Word of the Day' feature by ABS-CBN Lifestyle for July 20, 2026, highlighting the word 'trionda'. This daily initiative aims to educate audiences about lesser-known terms th...

item.title: Spain clinch second World Cup title with extra-time victory over Argentina
item.description: Spain secured their second World Cup triumph with a 1-0 extra-time victory over Argentina in a final marred by post-match chaos. Ferran Torres' decisive goal in the 106th minute ended Argentina's camp...

item.title: WSJ Criticizes Trump Over Efforts to Discredit Report on Air Force One Switch
item.description: The Wall Street Journal's conservative editorial board sharply criticized President Donald Trump for attempting to discredit a New York Times report detailing his switch from the Qatari-gifted Air For...

item.title: Spain Wins FIFA World Cup 2026 After Extra-Time Victory Over Argentina
item.description: Spain secured their second FIFA World Cup title in 2026 after a hard-fought 1-0 victory over Argentina in the final at the New York New Jersey Stadium. The match, which lasted over 120 minutes, saw Sp...

item.title: Mantrac and NMB Facilitate Equipment Finance for Mining Sector
item.description: The article highlights key developments in Tanzania's economic and infrastructure landscape. Mantrac and the National Mining Bank (NMB) have partnered to provide equipment financing for miners and con...

item.title: Former Emfuleni Fleet Manager Faces Fraud Charges in R16 Million Tender Scandal
item.description: A 42-year-old former fleet manager of the Emfuleni Local Municipality has been arrested by the Gauteng Political Killings Task Team (PKTT) on charges of fraud and corruption. The arrest follows an inv...

item.title: Luster dominates Woodbine Oaks, eyes King’s Plate victory
item.description: Luster, the 3-5 favorite, secured a dominant 5 1/2-length victory in the $750,000 Woodbine Oaks, the opening event of the Canadian Triple Tiara. Jockey John Velazquez positioned the filly in second be...

item.title: Master Hanz Cua's Insights on Feng Shui for July 20, 2026
item.description: The article discusses Feng Shui predictions by Master Hanz Cua for July 20, 2026, focusing on energy flow and auspicious arrangements. It highlights how specific dates and directions can influence per...

item.title: Spain clinch 2026 FIFA World Cup with 1-0 victory over Argentina
item.description: Spain have beaten 10-man Argentina 1-0 in extra time to win their second FIFA World Cup title. The match, which took place on Sunday, saw substitute Ferran Torres score the decisive goal in the second...

item.title: Passengers Falling Asleep in Robotaxis Trigger Emergency Calls
item.description: The article discusses the growing issue of passengers falling asleep in robotaxis, leading to emergency service calls. Companies like Alphabet and Tesla are facing challenges as unpredictable human be...

item.title: N.J. Transit Completes Major Infrastructure Project
item.description: New Jersey Transit has successfully completed a significant infrastructure project aimed at improving regional transportation efficiency. The initiative, which involved the expansion of rail networks ...

item.title: Andy Burnham becomes UK's fifth prime minister in four years amid political instability
item.description: The article discusses the UK's political landscape following the appointment of Andy Burnham as the fifth prime minister in four years. It highlights the trend of frequent leadership changes since 202...

item.title: Marvel Tokon: Fighting Souls Beta Details Revealed
item.description: Marvel Tokon: Fighting Souls, an upcoming fighting game, is set to launch within a month, with players gaining early access through an open beta phase. The beta, running from July 24 to July 26, 2026,...

item.title: NORAD F-16s Intercept Multiple Aircraft Violating Flight Restrictions Over New Jersey
item.description: The North American Aerospace Defense Command (NORAD) reported that its F-16 fighter jets intercepted over 10 general aviation aircraft that violated temporary flight restrictions over New Jersey on Ju...

item.title: Pastor's family kidnapped in Borno security incident
item.description: Suspected Boko Haram/ISWAP militants have kidnapped the wife of a pastor and his three children in Damasak, Borno State. The victims were traveling from Maiduguri to Damasak when attackers stopped the...
